stem: An ice block weighs 25 pounds when first placed outdoors. While outside, the ice melts at a rate of 1 pound every 3 hours. If 8 pounds of ice remain, for how many hours has the block been outdoors?
rationale: The block has lost 25 - 8 = 17 pounds. Each pound takes 3 hours to melt, so the total time is 17 × 3 = 51 hours. Choice A is correct.
